sizing_rule.note: Vince's optimal f method (Eq. 3.34): dynamically adjust contract count based on recalculated worst-case P&L (W variable from Eq. 3.35) when price distribution parameters change. This is parametric optimal-f sizing tied to distributional risk metrics.

source_rule_text: Adjust the number of contracts to trade based on changes in worst-case P&L (W variable) resulting from current price adjustments to equalized data in parametric distribution analysis.
